candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% across ALL pairs, the live signal has no historical analog — freeze new entries regardless of conviction, because directional conviction without a matched historical regime is untested pattern-fitting.
testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr == 0.0: return RegimeFreeze(pair)  # even if conv >= 0.50
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
